name: amasty/module-gdpr-pro-subscription-package
description: GDPR Pro Subscription Package by Amasty

suggest.amasty/module-gdpr-hyva: Install this package to insure Amasty GDPR extension works with Hyvä Theme.
suggest.amasty/module-gdpr-cookie-hyva: Install this package to insure Amasty Cookie extension works with Hyvä Theme.
suggest.amasty/module-gdpr-cookie-graphql: Install this package to insure Amasty Cookie Consent extension works with GraphQL.
suggest.amasty/module-google-consent-mode: Install this package for Google Consent Mode compatibility.
suggest.amasty/module-microsoft-consent-mode: Install this package for compatibility with Microsoft UET Consent Mode.
suggest.amasty/module-microsoft-consent-mode-hyv: Install this package for compatibility with Microsoft UET Consent Mode with Hyvä Theme.
suggest.amasty/module-gdpr-hyva-checkout: Install this package to ensure the GDPR Pro extension works with Hyvä Checkout.
suggest.amasty/module-gdpr-subscription-function: Install this package for compatibility with subscription features.
suggest.amasty/module-clarity-consent-mode: Install this package for compatibility with Microsoft Clarity consent mode.
suggest.amasty/module-clarity-consent-mode-hyva: Install this package for compatibility with Microsoft Clarity consent mode with Hyvä Theme.
